author: Artem Buldin
name: 11L XSA4 + EMA + BigramHash3072 + LZMA
blurb: 11-layer 512d SP-1024 stack with XSA on the last 4 layers, lrelu2 MLP3x, BigramHash(3072,112), partial RoPE(16), LN scale, VE128, EMA(0.997)+SWA, late QAT@0.15, and int6+lzma export. Canonical 8xH100 SXM run is valid at 15,616,435 bytes and 1.14523122 val_bpb.
